title: アナタが教えてくれた道だから

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning Ticket's been turning up the heat in the recent scrimmages.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: FINIIISH! Winning Ticket takes first priiize!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Did you see it?! My outstanding victoryyy! The glory's all mine,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Though some days are filled with laughter and joy...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I-I lost... No...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ug... Waaaaah! This suuucks! I'm retraining from scraaatch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Other days are filled—no, drowned—with tears.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Both wins and losses continue to pile up. And today...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Nooooo! I looooost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, Trainer! I have to keep training more and more!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
That's it! I'll train sooo hard! Full-speed training! First, a lap around
the track—NO! A lap around Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket's burning herself out like usual, so I rush to give her a suitable
training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Got it! Thanks! I'm going to hit the track right now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'll use this loss... to propel me into the Derbyyy!

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: Hey, how's it going? Your student's as fired up as they say.
choice_data_list: She's always at full blast. I'm lucky to have her.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I don't doubt it, but... That scrimmage loss shows she's still a bit rough
around the edges.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: Actually, it's not just that... She's too open with her feelings.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Her mood rouses up the other racers. They see her burst of speed and
feel pushed to try harder.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She needs to hide her power and lull her opponents into being
careless. It's an important tactic on the track.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Aw, heck. I'm saying too much to a rival trainer. Listen, don't worry
about it... See ya around.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hello? Trainer! Oh no! Did your spirit leave your body?! No!
Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking about what that trainer said so much, it seems to have
worried Ticket...
choice_data_list: Sorry, I was a little lost in thought.
Sorry, I was a little lost in thought.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whahuh?! You're back from the dead! It's a miracle! Oooh! Thank
goodneeess!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what you were thinking about? Tell me, tell me! I'll help you
think harder! Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's always giving it her all, so I want to do more to help her win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But should I follow the advice and teach her how to hide her cards?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ummm, hnnng... I can't take it! What are you worried about?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What can I do to help my most special partner... There must be
somethiiing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh, aaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, seeing her try so desperately, just like she always does, I
finally understand.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Trainer? Oh, hey... You look refreshed somehow.
choice_data_list: I know what to do now.
I know what to do now.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa, really? That's... great! Really great! Whoo-hooo!
choice_data_list: (You need to do what you do best!)
(You need to do what you do best!)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm set to go. Let's talk about my next regimen! I'll listen at full power
to whatever you say!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
After all, you really see me! You think about me! That's why I trust
you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt when I'm with you! Not one bit! I can steam forward
without holding anything back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if for the first time, I see the trust that shines in her eyes... And I
become determined to truly understand her.
